name: XPhone Connect
description: XPhone Connect is a unified communications and collaboration platform that brings telephony, presence, CRM, and hotline management into a single solution. It is customizable, integrates with existing systems, and emphasizes GDPR compliance.
longDescription:
XPhone Connect is a unified communications platform that combines telephony, chat, meetings, and messaging in a single application. It integrates with existing PBX systems and business applications such as CRM and ERP systems.

The platform includes computer telephony integration, softphone functionality, presence management, and a centralized communication history. It supports office, remote, and mobile work scenarios through desktop and mobile clients.

XPhone Connect is developed and maintained by a German company and is aimed at organizations that need strong integration with existing telephony infrastructure while meeting European data protection requirements. It can be deployed on premises or in hybrid environments so companies can keep control of their communication infrastructure and data.
features: No vendor lock-in via open standards
Supports SIP, WebRTC and REST APIs
